'''CB-3D''' was [[Flynn Kybo]]'s [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Attempting to assassinate [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]], CB-3D came along in case the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] codes they were planning to use should fail.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[General Grievous 2|''General Grievous'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]]
